title: Synthetic Pokemon Pack
description: Adds Type:Null and Silvally to Cobblemon.
body:
Synthetic Pokemon Pack

Adds Type: Null and Silvally to Cobblemon. Put in resource pack folder and data pack folder for your save file to get all the features.

Type: Null spawns in Ancient Cities, in the Ultra-Rare bucket. It drops a netherite scrap upon defeat.

Silvally’s mechanics are edited, due to RKS System not having full implementation. Ability is changed to Adaptability.

Silvally can evolve into its type forms as long as it knows Multi Attack. It can evolve back to Normal Type if it knows Multi Attack. It must pass through Normal Type to change types. Each Silvally type learns a move at that type, and it keeps that move in its pool even after it changes type.

Steel - Flash Cannon (already learns via TM)

Water - Aqua Tail (has aquatic tail)

Grass - Needle Arm (has pokey forelegs)

Fire - Heat Wave (already learns via TM)

Ground - Stomping Tantrum (Silvally retains its wild nature even after evolving)

Electric - Discharge (is mechanical)

Dragon - Dragon Claw (already learns via TM)

Poison - Acid Spray (is mechanical, seems fitting if Silvally malfunctions)

Flying - Defog (has a wing on its head; already learns two damaging Flying-Type moves)

Fighting - Double Kick (has legs)

Psychic - Psychic Fangs (already learns via TM)

Dark - Snarl (already learns via TM)

Fairy - Spirit Break (thematic link to its previous form as Type:Null)

Bug - Signal Beam (is mechanical)

Ice - Freeze Dry (thematic link to its cryogenic freezing as Type:Null)

Ghost - Shadow Claw (already learns via TM)

Rock - Rock Slide (already learns via TM)
